title: Bell state in OpenQASM 2
prompt: Write an OpenQASM 2.0 program that prepares a Bell state on two qubits and measures both into a classical register.
expected_features: qreg of 2 qubits and creg of 2 bits
h on q[0] and cx q[0],q[1]
notes: qcheck v0 checks header, register declarations, index ranges, and measurement validity. Semantic correctness of the state is future work.
